_note: whisper.cpp v1.7.6 ships prebuilt server binaries only for Windows (inside whisper-bin-x64.zip). macOS and Linux office-server admins must build whisper-server from source: https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp#server. The supervisor surfaces UnsupportedPlatform for those platforms until prebuilt binaries become available.

macos-aarch64._note: whisper.cpp does not ship a prebuilt whisper-server binary for macOS. Build from source: https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp#server

macos-x86_64._note: whisper.cpp does not ship a prebuilt whisper-server binary for macOS. Build from source: https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp#server

linux-x86_64._note: whisper.cpp does not ship a prebuilt whisper-server binary for Linux. Build from source: https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp#server

windows-x86_64._note: whisper-server.exe is bundled inside whisper-bin-x64.zip. The repo moved from ggerganov/ to ggml-org/ between v1.7.5 and v1.7.6; use the ggml-org URL. zip SHA256 verified 2026-05-02.
